response.justification: Aisha has extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks — aligning well with the role’s core stack and responsibilities, though limited explicit use of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java raises minor gaps.
strengths: Proven full-stack ownership across frontend and backend systems
Strong AI-agent and developer tooling experience
Deep testing and DevOps practices (CI/CD, Docker, GitLab)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in experience
Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java usage in recent roles
German language proficiency is basic, may hinder local collaboration
